pages.text: $(o)"Threads are structure. Mana is what surges."$()$(br2)If $(l)Transcendence$() shattered into eighteen $(l)elemental threads$(), then $(l)mana$() is the current that runs along them ‚Äî the threads do not move; the mana does.

pages.title: What Mana Is
pages.text: Mana is not the elements themselves ‚Äî it is the elements' $(l)flowing state$().$(br2)Fire does not burn inside mana ‚Äî mana $(l)surges$() along the trace of fire.$(br2)Ancient mages identified three states:$(br)¬∑ $(l)$(#fa0)Manifest$()$(): visible spells and runes$(br)¬∑ $(l)$(#5cf)Latent$()$(): the undercurrent in leylines$(br)¬∑ $(l)$(#3c3)Crystalline$()$(): solidified storage in crystals

pages.title: Three Vessels
pages.text: Mana can be held in three kinds of vessels:$(br2)$(l)$(#5cf)Leylines$()$(): natural ‚Äî every chunk's roots flow with raw mana$(br2)$(l)$(#3c3)Crystals$()$(): artificial ‚Äî freeze flow into portable stockpiles$(br2)$(l)$(#fa0)The mage themselves$()$(): living ‚Äî after ascension, the mage's body becomes a mana pool

$(l)$(#fa0)The Innate Pool$()$()$(br2)Ascension rebuilds the mage's body. From the $(l)Tempering Ritual$() onward, there is now "mana space" inside ‚Äî what v3 calls the $(l)$(#9cf)Max Mana$()$() attribute.$(br2)This space cannot be taken like a crystal, nor tapped like a leyline ‚Äî it $(l)is the mage$().

pages.title: Why Innate Drains First
pages.text: When casting, ancient law commands $(l)from near to far$() ‚Äî energy in your own body is called first, then bag crystals, then environmental leylines.$(br2)$(l)v3$(): casting 100 mana drains in order innate ‚Üí storage ‚Üí crystals.$(br2)$(o)"He who will not spend himself is unworthy to spend others."$() ‚Äî ancient precept

pages.title: The Source of Auto-Regen
pages.text: When $(l)$(#3c3)Mana Regen$()$() > 0, the mage absorbs trace mana from $(l)environmental leylines$() each second, auto-replenishing the innate pool.$(br2)This is not creation ex nihilo ‚Äî it makes the mage themselves into a $(l)mini-leyline$() extension.$(br2)$(o)"To breathe with the earth."$() ‚Äî Earthshaper's core creed

pages.title: Limits
pages.text: $(l)Cap$(): MAX_MANA 65536 ‚Äî theoretical limit of the human vessel. Mid-late ascension typically 800-2000; elite gear pushes to 5000+; 65536 requires stacking endgame rares.$(br2)$(l)Regen$(): 100/sec ‚Äî the boundary of $(l)manifest-state resonance$(). Past this, mana causes "overflow scars" on the mage (future content).

pages.title: Mana and Time
pages.text: $(l)Time$() in the old magical system is not a single line ‚Äî it is a byproduct of mana.$(br2)Slow leyline flow ‚Üí time relatively accelerates (player feels CDR).$(br2)Depleted leylines ‚Üí time relatively congeals (player feels casting slowdown).$(br2)This is the true relation between $(l)Cooldown Reduction$() and $(l)leyline density$() ‚Äî and why Still Mind (CDR+10%) costs $(l)move speed -5%$(): you signed a contract with time.
